creator: oberman@es.net
text:
The IRRToolSet has been updated several times since I last could
reliably build it on FreeBSD. The newest version, thnks to help from
NetBSD folks, now builds correctly and the port can be updated.

Fix: Update the port as per the attached file. 

Note that the differences show a name of irrtoolset-nox11. I am a bit
usure of wheter this should be an update to met-mgmt/irrtoolset or
whether it really should bde a new port as the X11 based tools aoe and
roe are no longer present. I suspect that these tools were VERY
lightly used and keeping the old port around is of very questionable
value.

A couple of other tools were also removed, but other tools developed
since the original toolset was written do the jobs of these and do
them more efficiently. 
How-To-Repeat: N/A
